programmes.show_description: Hidden Truth: When a vital witness to a gangland killing goes missing before she can give evidence in court, Frost is under pressure to find her and her son before they are killed.
The Epidemic: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal at the Luxton Bus Company. Can Stan avoid the dreaded 'lurgy' before a big date?
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Dead on Arrival: Drama series about a Cornish detective. Wycliffe's silver wedding anniversary celebrations come to an abrupt halt when crime rears its head.
Number of the Beast: Drama series about a Cornish police detective. When unexplained killings rock the Bodmin community, locals are convinced that the 'beast' is back.
Falling Darkness: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the murder of a university friend of Hobson - as more deaths occur, they realise that Laura's past may hold the key.
The Body in the Library: Miss Marple is called by an old friend to help discover who strangled a young dancer in the library of Gossington Hall.
The Invisible Worm: Light-hearted drama series. Rosemary and Laura are caught up in a strange ritual when they visit a preparatory school to investigate why its roses are dying.
The Gongoozlers: Light-hearted drama series. Laura teams up with a yachtswoman-turned-TV presenter to investigate when Rosemary is injured in a suspicious filming accident.
Dead in the Water: Barnaby and Scott dig into the luxury lifestyles of the rowing set when the annual Midsomer Regatta is brought to a standstill after a body is found in a river.
Orchis Fatalis: When one of the world's rarest orchids is smuggled illegally into Midsomer Malham, it triggers a catalogue of passion, jealousy and death.
Second Sight: When Barnaby and Scott investigate the death of a man recently ejected from a pub for fighting, the post-mortem shows that he may have been subject to electric shocks.
Hidden Depths: Barnaby and Scott investigate when a solicitor falls from a roof to his death. A revenge motive emerges when the dead man's rival also dies - but who is behind it?
The Seagull: DCI Vera Stanhope must find the connection between a skeleton discovered underneath the site of a notorious burnt-out nightclub and a present-day murder.
Near Death Experience: Frost begins a manhunt for a serial killer when he uncovers a web of lies surrounding the investigation into the vicious murder of a widow.
The Nursery: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy bus driver. Jack and Stan think that Olive is the ideal candidate to become supervisor of the depot's nursery.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
The Busmen's Ball: Sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal. It is the annual Busmen's Ball and the lads decide that they want something a little more exciting this year...
Slave of Duty: Drama series about a Cornish detective. The team are intrigued by the case of a dead man found buried with a pile of 100-year-old wood.
Total Loss: Drama series about a Cornish detective. When a fishing boat sinks killing one of the crew, Kersey and Lane discover a community struggling to keep its head above water.
Wild Justice: When Lewis investigates the poisoning of a visiting female bishop, two more deaths mirroring macabre murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy convolute proceedings.
Overture: When DC Endeavour Morse investigates the disappearance of a missing Oxford schoolgirl, he soon risks all in a search for justice that will ultimately shape his destiny.
Happily Ever After: Comedy-drama series about a doctor who moves to a small Cornish town. Martin and Louisa's wedding day arrives, but the day is plagued by all sorts of disasters.
The Italian Rapscallion: Drama series about sleuthing gardeners. A mysterious death occurs while Rosemary and Laura are preparing the garden of a restaurant that is opening in Italy.
Swords into Ploughshares: Light-hearted series about a pair of sleuthing horticulturalists. An archaeologist who posed as Rosemary to gain access to an estate is found dead.
Five Little Pigs: Another case for the Belgian detective. Poirot is called in to re-examine the murder of Amyas Crale, a painter whose wife was hanged for the crime 14 years before.
The Murder at the Vicarage: Colonel Protheroe is intensely disliked, but when he is found slumped over the desk in a vicarage study, Miss Marple must unpick the truth.
Sauce for the Goose: Barnaby and Scott delve into the murder of a visitor to a relish factory and discover a web of secrets and lies within the family that own it.
Blood Will Tell: DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the case of a murdered entrepreneur whose legacy of unpaid debts and ruined lives leaves no shortage of suspects.
